title: Sender vs Loops (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Sender vs Loops: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Sender and Loops comes down to your specific use case. Sender is built for small businesses wanting a generous free plan, while Loops targets SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails.

comparison_table.tool_a: Small Businesses Wanting A Generous Free Plan
comparison_table.tool_b: Saas Companies Sending Product And Lifecycle Emails

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on small businesses wanting a generous free plan
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Sender wins for small businesses wanting a generous free plan, while Loops is stronger for SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Sender or Loops?
faq.a: Sender starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Loops to Sender?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
